loras.notes: Runware: scale 0.8 too weak, need 1.0+. 2026-07-05: 592MB file size overpowers ALL FLUX style LoRAs (not just ones in incompatible_with). Even at 0.2 scale, style LoRAs like sanguosha-style get pulled toward photorealism. Rule: disable NSFW MASTER when using style LoRAs, use prompt-only NSFW instead.
